name: claude-kit
description: Claude Code skills + agents for React 19 / Vite SPA work. Two plugins: react-core (portable skills) and react-agents (templates + profile-generator).

plugins.name: react-core
plugins.description: React 19 / Vite SPA skills: perf, composition, audit, revamp, ux-review, dry, test-patterns, debug, scrutinize, post-mortem. Stack-agnostic across any web-React project.

plugins.name: react-agents
plugins.description: Templates for the build/polish/pre-commit subagent trio + a profile-generator skill that scaffolds a project-specific profile interactively.
